final:
module d_ff_enable
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input en,
    input d,
    output reg q
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        q <= 1'b0;
    end
    else if (en) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
